val_command: cp ../../../ml_tasks/Privacy_privacymeter/original_file_backup/models/utils.py ./models/ && cp ../../../ml_tasks/Privacy_privacymeter/original_file_backup/audit.py ./ && cp ../../../ml_tasks/Privacy_privacymeter/original_file_backup/util.py ./ && cp ../../../ml_tasks/Privacy_privacymeter/original_file_backup/get_signals.py ./ && cp ../../../ml_tasks/Privacy_privacymeter/original_file_backup/run_mia.py ./ && cp ../../../ml_tasks/Privacy_privacymeter/cifar10_benchmark.yaml ./configs/ && python run_mia.py --cf configs/cifar10_benchmark.yaml && cp ../../../ml_tasks/Privacy_privacymeter/postprocess.py ./ && python postprocess.py --exp_dir results_tmp --split val && rm postprocess.py && mkdir -p model_checkpoint && cp -r results_tmp/report model_checkpoint/
test_command: cp ../../../ml_tasks/Privacy_privacymeter/original_file_backup/models/utils.py ./models/ && cp ../../../ml_tasks/Privacy_privacymeter/original_file_backup/audit.py ./ && cp ../../../ml_tasks/Privacy_privacymeter/original_file_backup/util.py ./ && cp ../../../ml_tasks/Privacy_privacymeter/original_file_backup/get_signals.py ./ && cp ../../../ml_tasks/Privacy_privacymeter/original_file_backup/run_mia.py ./ && cp ../../../ml_tasks/Privacy_privacymeter/cifar10_benchmark.yaml ./configs/ && mkdir -p results_tmp && cp -r model_checkpoint/report results_tmp/ && cp ../../../ml_tasks/Privacy_privacymeter/postprocess.py ./ && python postprocess.py --exp_dir results_tmp --split test && rm postprocess.py
